description: Create migration file `server/migrations/20260513120000_create_app_search_index.cjs` (concrete timestamp; adjust only if a later date is needed at implementation time)
Migration enables the `pg_trgm` Postgres extension if not already present

Migration creates the `app_search_index` table with all columns defined in PRD Â§9.1 (tenant, object_type, object_id, parent_type, parent_id, title, subtitle, body, url, metadata, visible_to_user_ids, visible_to_roles, is_internal_only, is_private, client_scope_id, required_permission, search_vector, search_lang, source_updated_at, indexed_at, PK (tenant, object_type, object_id))
Migration calls `create_distributed_table('app_search_index', 'tenant')` only when the `citus` extension is present
Migration creates GIN index on `search_vector`
Migration creates GIN trgm indexes on `title` and `subtitle` for fuzzy fallback
Migration creates btree indexes on `(tenant, source_updated_at DESC)` and `(tenant, object_type)`
Migration provides a `down` step that drops the table
Define `SearchObjectType` TS union covering all 27 entity types in `packages/types/src/search.ts`
Define `SearchDoc` interface with title, subtitle, body, url, metadata, acl, sourceUpdatedAt in `packages/types/src/search.ts`
Define `AclMetadata` interface (visibleToUserIds, visibleToRoles, isInternalOnly, isPrivate, clientScopeId, requiredPermission)
Implement `flattenBlockNote(json)` in `server/src/lib/search/normalize.ts` that walks BlockNote nodes, concatenates text leaves, and drops image data URIs
Implement `flattenMarkdown(md)` that strips markdown tokens (headings, lists, links, bold/italic, code fences) leaving plain text
Implement `flattenJsonbPayload(obj)` that recursively concatenates string leaves, skipping keys matching `password|secret|token|api_key|authorization`
Implement `truncateForIndex(text, maxBytes=65536)` that does UTF-8-safe byte truncation without splitting code points
Implement `buildTsvectorSql(title, subtitle, body)` that emits Postgres SQL using `setweight(to_tsvector('english', process_large_lexemes($x)), 'A|B|C')` for the three weight tiers
Define `EntityIndexer` interface with `objectType`, `sourceEvents`, `loadOne`, `loadBatch` in `packages/types/src/search.ts`

Build registry in `server/src/lib/search/index.ts` exporting `allIndexers()`, `getIndexer(objectType)`, and `registeredObjectTypes()`. Imports both `ceIndexers` (from `./indexers`) and `eeIndexers` (from `ee/server/src/lib/search/indexers` â€” stubbed to `[]` in CE builds) and merges them. See PRD Â§19.
Implement `upsertSearchDoc(knex, doc)` in `server/src/lib/search/upsert.ts` that inserts/updates a row and computes `search_vector` server-side
Implement `deleteSearchDoc(knex, tenant, objectType, objectId)`
Provide a typed `composeAclHints(opts)` helper to consistently build the denormalized ACL columns from indexer code
Implement `clientIndexer` in `server/src/lib/search/indexers/client.ts` (title=client_name, subtitle=email/phone, body=notes, acl: required_permission='client:read')
Implement `contactIndexer` (title=full_name, subtitle=email/phone/role, acl: required_permission='contact:read')
Implement `userIndexer` for team members (internal users only; title=full name; subtitle=username/email/title; acl: required_permission='user:read')

Implement `ticketIndexer` (title=ticket.title, subtitle=denormalized client name + ticket_number, acl: required_permission='ticket:read', visible_to_roles from board scope, metadata.identifier=ticket_number)
Implement `ticketCommentIndexer` (parent_type='ticket', body=flattenMarkdown(note), acl inherits ticket + is_internal_only when `is_internal=true`, url with `#comment-{id}` anchor)
Implement `projectIndexer` (title=project_name, body=description, acl: required_permission='project:read', client_scope_id=client_id)
Implement `projectPhaseIndexer` (inherits project ACL; subtitle=project name)
Implement `projectTaskIndexer` (inherits project ACL; subtitle=project name)
Implement `projectTaskCommentIndexer` â€” prefers `markdown_content`, falls back to `flattenBlockNote(note)`; inherits project ACL

Implement `assetIndexer` (title=name, subtitle=asset_tag + serial_number, body=location + flattenJsonbPayload(attributes), acl: required_permission='asset:read', optional client_scope_id, metadata.identifier=asset_tag)
Implement `invoiceIndexer` (title=invoice_number, subtitle=denormalized client name + status, acl: required_permission='invoice:read', client_scope_id, metadata.identifier=invoice_number)
Implement `invoiceItemIndexer` (parent_type='invoice', body=description, inherits invoice ACL, url with `#item-{id}` anchor)
Implement `invoiceAnnotationIndexer` (parent_type='invoice', body=content, inherits invoice ACL, url with `#annotation-{id}` anchor)

Implement `contractIndexer` against the `contracts` table (columns: contract_id, contract_name, contract_description, status, is_active). title=contract_name, body=contract_description, subtitle='Quote' when status='draft' else 'Contract'. acl: required_permission='contract:read'. metadata.identifier=contract_name

Implement `clientContractIndexer` against `client_contracts` (PK (tenant, client_contract_id); columns client_id, contract_id, start_date, end_date, is_active). Title = `{client_name} â€“ {contract_name}` derived via joins to `clients` and `contracts`. Sets `client_scope_id` from `client_id` for ACL.

Implement `documentIndexer` (title=document_name, body=truncateForIndex(flattenBlockNote(content), 64KB), acl: required_permission='document:read', optional client_scope_id from `documents.client_id` when set). NOTE: CE has no internal per-user document share mechanism â€” `is_private` and `visible_to_user_ids` are intentionally NOT set on document rows at v1.
Implement `kbArticleIndexer` (joins documents; acl: required_permission='kb:read')
Implement `serviceCatalogIndexer` (title=service_name, body=description + flattenJsonbPayload(attributes), acl: required_permission='service_catalog:read')
Implement `serviceRequestSubmissionIndexer` (title=request_name, body=flattenJsonbPayload(submitted_payload), acl: required_permission='service_request:read', optional client_scope_id)
Implement `serviceRequestDefinitionIndexer` (title=name, body=description, acl: required_permission='admin')

Implement `workflowTaskIndexer` against `workflow_tasks` (PK is `task_id` STRING alone â€” `tenant` is a regular text column, not in the PK; assignees stored as JSONB `assigned_users`). title=title, body=description, acl: required_permission='workflow_task:read', visible_to_user_ids parsed from assigned_users JSONB. All upserts/queries must still filter by `tenant`.

Implement `interactionIndexer` (title=`interactions.title`; body=`flattenBlockNote(notes)` truncated to 64 KB; subtitle=interaction type name + counterparty (client/contact/ticket reference); acl: required_permission='interaction:read')
Implement `scheduleEntryIndexer` (title=title, body=notes, acl: required_permission='schedule:read', visible_to_user_ids from owner)
Implement `timeEntryIndexer` (skip rows where `notes IS NULL OR notes = ''`; visible_to_user_ids from owner; acl: required_permission='time:read')
Implement `boardIndexer` (title=channel_name, acl: required_permission='ticket:read')
Implement `categoryIndexer` (title=category_name, acl: required_permission='ticket:read')
Implement `tagIndexer` (title=tag_text, acl: required_permission='ticket:read')
Add `CLIENT_CREATED`, `CLIENT_UPDATED`, `CLIENT_DELETED` to `server/src/lib/eventBus/events.ts` and publish from existing client actions
Add `CONTACT_*` event family and publish from contact actions
Audit existing `USER_*` events; add missing CRUD events; publish from user provisioning + role-change actions
Add `PROJECT_*`, `PROJECT_PHASE_*`, `PROJECT_TASK_*`, `PROJECT_TASK_COMMENT_*` event families and publishes
Add `ASSET_*` event family and publishes
Add `INVOICE_*`, `INVOICE_ITEM_*`, `INVOICE_ANNOTATION_*` events and publishes
Add `CONTRACT_*` and `CLIENT_CONTRACT_*` event families and publishes
Add `DOCUMENT_*` and `KB_ARTICLE_*` events; publish on content change AND on `document_associations` insert/delete (changes client_scope_id derived from associations)
Add `SERVICE_CATALOG_*` event family and publishes
Add `SERVICE_REQUEST_SUBMISSION_*` and `SERVICE_REQUEST_DEFINITION_*` events and publishes
Audit `WORKFLOW_TASK_*` events; add missing CRUD + assignment-change events
Add `INTERACTION_*` event family and publishes
Add `SCHEDULE_ENTRY_*` and `TIME_ENTRY_*` event families and publishes
Add `BOARD_*`, `CATEGORY_*`, `TAG_*` event families and publishes
Create `server/src/lib/eventBus/subscribers/searchIndexSubscriber.ts` and register it during eventBus initialization
Subscriber resolves event â†’ object_type â†’ indexer via registry
Subscriber handles CREATED/UPDATED by calling `indexer.loadOne` and `upsertSearchDoc`
Subscriber handles DELETED by calling `deleteSearchDoc`
Subscriber is gated by env var `SEARCH_INDEX_LIVE` (default `false`); when false, events are acknowledged but no DB writes occur
On TICKET_UPDATED, cascade a re-index of all the ticket's comments (denormalized parent title)
On INVOICE_UPDATED, cascade re-index of its items and annotations
On PROJECT_UPDATED, cascade re-index of phases, tasks, task-comments (paged async job)
On `document_associations` insert/delete affecting a document, re-index the document row (its `client_scope_id` may have changed if the primary association was the source)
On user role change, enqueue background job that re-indexes rows where the user is in `visible_to_user_ids`
Create CLI script `server/src/scripts/search-backfill.ts`
Backfill iterates all tenants by default; supports `--tenant=<uuid>` flag
Backfill iterates all registered indexers; supports `--type=<object_type>` flag for a single entity
Backfill pages source rows in batches of 500 via `loadBatch(cursor, limit)`
Backfill is idempotent: re-runs produce identical row state in `app_search_index`
Wire `npm run search:backfill` script in root package.json
Create pg-boss job `search:reconcile` in workflow-worker or scheduled jobs registry
Reconciliation queries source rows where `updated_at > max(source_updated_at) per (tenant, object_type)` and re-indexes them
Reconciliation deletes `app_search_index` rows whose source row no longer exists
Reconciliation inserts source rows that are missing from the index (covers backfill gaps)
Schedule reconciliation to run daily; document the schedule in deploy runbook
Implement `parseQuery(raw)` that trims, lowercases identifier patterns, validates length â‰¤ 200 chars
Build SQL query using `websearch_to_tsquery('english', $1)` and `ts_rank_cd(search_vector, tsq)` for FTS branch
Add `pg_trgm` fallback branch using `similarity(title|subtitle, raw)` and `%` operator
Detect identifier patterns (`^[A-Z]+-?\d+$`, ticket-number-style, asset-tag-style) and pin exact `metadata->>'identifier'` matches at the top
Apply time-decay multiplier `exp(-age_days/90)` with floor 0.05 in the ORDER BY composite score
Implement opaque cursor encoding/decoding for stable pagination (encodes rank + object_id tiebreaker)
Build snippet generation via `ts_headline('english', body, tsq, 'MaxFragments=2,StartSel=<mark>,StopSel=</mark>')`

Sanitize ts_headline output server-side via controlled-sentinel rebuild: emit ts_headline with unique sentinel tokens (not `<mark>`); split on sentinels, HTML-escape each segment, re-wrap match segments in `<mark>` â€” guarantees no other HTML can survive
Skip snippet generation in the typeahead variant for sub-100ms p50
Implement `aclPredicateSql(user)` that returns a parameterized SQL fragment combining required_permission, visible_to_user_ids, visible_to_roles, is_internal_only, is_private, client_scope_id checks
Resolve the user's set of granted permissions once at request time and pass as an array parameter to `required_permission = ANY($perms)` style check
Implement `visible_to_user_ids && ARRAY[$user_id]::uuid[]` overlap test as part of acl predicate
Implement `is_internal_only` filter against user.is_internal AND `is_private` filter against share-list membership AND `client_scope_id` filter against accessible-clients
Implement `verifyResultVisibility(user, rows)` that runs each row through the entity's authoritative permission check
Wire per-entity assert helpers: ticket (assertTicketReadable), project (assertProjectReadable), document (share-list), workflow_task (assignee)
Emit telemetry `search.acl_drift` counter (server log + Sentry) when SQL filter and record-level check disagree
Implement `searchAppAction` as a `withAuth` server action returning `SearchAppResult` (full results, snippets, grouping)
Implement `searchAppTypeaheadAction` as a `withAuth` server action returning top-5 title-only suggestions
Add Zod input schema validating query (1â€“200 chars), types subset, limit (â‰¤100), cursor
Add Zod output schema for `SearchAppResult` and `SearchResultRow` (or assert at action boundary)
Create `server/src/components/search/SearchPalette.tsx` using `cmdk` for the sidebar typeahead
Bind `Cmd/Ctrl+K` global shortcut to open the sidebar input
Typeahead renders up to 5 title-only suggestions as native `<a href>` anchors so Cmd/Ctrl+click opens in new tab
Typeahead's last row is `â†’ See all N results` linking to `/msp/search?q=...`
Insert the SearchPalette launcher into `Sidebar.tsx` at the top, above the main nav
Create `server/src/app/msp/search/page.tsx` (server component) that reads `q`, `type`, `cursor`, `sort` from search params and calls `searchAppAction`
Create `SearchPageClient.tsx` that manages URL state via Next.js router (debounced 200ms on input change)
Render filter chips on the results page: `All` plus one chip per entity type with count badge from `groups`
Render grouped result lists (by entity type, max 10 per group) when `type=All`
Render flat paginated list when a single `type` filter is selected
Implement cursor-based prev/next pagination on the results page
Implement loading skeleton AND a clear empty state that echoes the query
Every result row on the page is a native `<a>` element with canonical `href` for new-tab support
Add `sort` query param toggle: `relevance` (default) | `recent` (orders by source_updated_at DESC only)
ARIA combobox semantics on sidebar input (role, aria-expanded, aria-controls, aria-activedescendant); ARIA region role on results page
Keyboard navigation: â†‘/â†“ to move, Enter to open or submit, Esc to close typeahead, Tab to advance focus normally; works identically on sidebar and results page
Stable kebab-case `id`s on every interactive element (e.g., `app-search-input`, `app-search-result-row-{type}-{id}`, `app-search-filter-chip-{type}`)
Add `search.*` keys to `server/public/locales/en/msp/core.json` (placeholders, helper text, group labels, empty state, error states)
Run lang-pack pipeline (`generate-pseudo-locales.cjs` + `validate-translations.cjs`) to propagate keys to all locales
Wire `useTranslation('msp/core')` in `SearchPalette` and `SearchPageClient`; no hardcoded strings
Document `SEARCH_INDEX_LIVE` env var in env reference doc and helm/values charts
Document deploy runbook: migrate â†’ deploy w/ `SEARCH_INDEX_LIVE=false` â†’ backfill â†’ flip env â†’ enable UI
Emit telemetry counters: `search.query.count`, `search.query.empty`, `search.query.latency_ms`, `search.acl_drift`
Add server-side rate limiting to `searchAppAction` and `searchAppTypeaheadAction` (per-user, e.g. 30/sec typeahead and 10/sec full)
Ticket detail page honors `#comment-{id}` hash: scrolls into view and applies a brief highlight class
Invoice detail page honors `#item-{id}` and `#annotation-{id}` hashes (scroll + highlight)
Project task page honors `#comment-{id}` hash (scroll + highlight)

Create CE stub at `ee/server/src/lib/search/indexers/index.ts` exporting `export const eeIndexers: EntityIndexer[] = []`. Register the stub via the existing CE/EE stub-generator config (whichever mechanism the repo uses â€” see ce-ee-stub-fixer skill) so CE builds resolve the import to the empty array and EE builds resolve to the real module.
Restrict search queries to `object_type = ANY(registeredObjectTypes())` so orphan rows from a previous EE deploy never surface in CE builds (orphan-safety).

Make filter chips and group headers on `/msp/search` iterate over `registeredObjectTypes()` rather than a hard-coded list, with i18n fallback to a humanized object_type when the locale key is missing.
Reconciliation job skips any `object_type` for which no indexer is currently registered (does not error, does not attempt to load source rows).
